privileged_info_summary: The task relies on synthetically generated SeisComP pick data injected at runtime. The required script must monitor the 'PICK' messaging group (confirmed by SeisComP scdispatch documentation) and write output to '/home/ga/pick_log.txt', as verified by the task export scripts.
